commentaries.author: Cyril of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Thou shalt be firmer unto faith, saith He, when thou seest greater things than these. For he that believed one sign, how shall he not by means of many be altogether bettered, especially since they shall be more wonderful than those now wondered at?

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Greater things than these. Greater miracles and proofs that I am the Messias, and the true Son of God. (Witham)

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: And as their love towards God increases, He bestows more and greater

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: And He affirmed Himself that they were quite right in their convictions; for He answered Nathanael: "Because I said, I saw thee under the fig-tree, therefore dose thou believe?"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
